umidi
  • API Reference
  • Struct UMP32
  • View page source

Struct UMP32

  • Defined in File ump.hh

Struct Documentation

struct UMP32

32-bit Universal MIDI Packet (Optimized).

Stores as single uint32_t for efficient comparison and manipulation. Layout: [MT:4][Group:4][Status:8][Data1:8][Data2:8]

Example:
auto note_on = UMP32::note_on(0, 60, 100);
if (note_on.is_note_on()) {
    process_note(note_on.note(), note_on.velocity());
}

Public Functions

constexpr UMP32() noexcept = default
inline explicit constexpr UMP32(uint32_t raw) noexcept
inline constexpr UMP32(uint8_t mt, uint8_t group, uint8_t status, uint8_t d1, uint8_t d2) noexcept
inline uint8_t mt() const noexcept
inline uint8_t group() const noexcept
inline uint8_t status() const noexcept
inline uint8_t data1() const noexcept
inline uint8_t data2() const noexcept
inline uint8_t channel() const noexcept
inline uint8_t command() const noexcept
inline void set_mt_group(uint8_t mt, uint8_t g) noexcept
inline void set_status(uint8_t s) noexcept
inline void set_data1(uint8_t d) noexcept
inline void set_data2(uint8_t d) noexcept
inline bool is_note_on() const noexcept
inline bool is_note_off() const noexcept
inline bool is_cc() const noexcept
inline bool is_program_change() const noexcept
inline bool is_channel_pressure() const noexcept
inline bool is_pitch_bend() const noexcept
inline bool is_poly_pressure() const noexcept
inline bool is_midi1_cv() const noexcept
inline bool is_system() const noexcept
inline bool is_realtime() const noexcept
inline uint8_t note() const noexcept
inline uint8_t velocity() const noexcept
inline uint8_t cc_number() const noexcept
inline uint8_t cc_value() const noexcept
inline uint8_t program() const noexcept
inline uint8_t pressure() const noexcept
inline uint16_t pitch_bend_value() const noexcept
inline uint32_t raw() const noexcept
inline bool is_timing_clock() const noexcept
inline bool is_start() const noexcept
inline bool is_stop() const noexcept
inline bool is_continue() const noexcept
inline bool is_active_sensing() const noexcept
inline bool is_system_reset() const noexcept
inline bool is_tune_request() const noexcept
inline uint8_t mtc_data() const noexcept
inline uint16_t song_position() const noexcept
inline uint8_t song_number() const noexcept
inline bool operator==(const UMP32 &other) const noexcept
inline bool operator!=(const UMP32 &other) const noexcept

Public Members

uint32_t word = 0

Public Static Functions

static inline UMP32 create(uint8_t mt, uint8_t group, uint8_t status, uint8_t d1, uint8_t d2 = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 note_on(uint8_t channel, uint8_t note, uint8_t velocity, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 note_off(uint8_t channel, uint8_t note, uint8_t velocity = 0, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 cc(uint8_t channel, uint8_t cc_num, uint8_t value, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 program_change(uint8_t channel, uint8_t program, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 pitch_bend(uint8_t channel, uint16_t value, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 timing_clock(uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 start(uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 stop(uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 continue_msg(uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 active_sensing(uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 system_reset(uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 tune_request(uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 mtc_quarter_frame(uint8_t data, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 song_position(uint16_t beats, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 song_select(uint8_t song, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 channel_pressure(uint8_t channel, uint8_t pressure, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
static inline UMP32 poly_pressure(uint8_t channel, uint8_t note, uint8_t pressure, uint8_t group = 0) noexcept
